header: Gerente de Excelência Comercial — Sanofi Medley

lesson.menu_desc: Present perfect with for and since -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 18 -- Talking About Your Career Story -- present perfect with for & since
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Gleice Leonardo Rocha de Souza | Aula 18 -- Talking About Your Career Story

listenings.text: Good morning, Gleice. Let me tell you my career story. I have worked at this company for twelve years, and I have been a senior manager since 2018. My background is in chemistry, and my main field is commercial strategy. The company hired me as a junior in 2012, and I have learned a new skill every year. I have been very dedicated to my team, and I have stayed loyal to the company for a long time. I have held this position since the last reorganization. So, tell me, Gleice, how long have you worked in your field?

Hello, my name is Renata, and I want to share my career story. I have worked in the pharmaceutical field for fifteen years, and I have lived in São Paulo since 2010. My background is in biology, and the company hired me for a junior position. I have been a senior leader since 2019, and I have built a strong skill in negotiation. I have been loyal and dedicated to my team for many years, and I have grown with the company. I have loved every step of this journey. How long have you been in your current position?

extra_audio.text: First, David gives a duration with for: I have worked here for twelve years. Then he gives a start point with since: I have been a senior manager since 2018. After that, he describes his background and field: my background is in chemistry, and my field is commercial strategy. Next, he talks about his skills and loyalty: I have learned a new skill every year, and I have stayed loyal to the company. Finally, he asks about your career: how long have you worked in your field?
